title: US limits intelligence sharing with Korea after remarks on North Korea nuclear site: Report
summary_full: US has partially restricted satellite intelligence sharing with South Korea after Seoul's unification minister revealed details about a suspected North Korean uranium enrichment site. While the minister claims the information was public, Washington views it as an unauthorized disclosure.  Despite this, officials state military preparedness and broader intelligence cooperation remain unaffected.
